seo.title: Book a Discovery Call - Yordan Ivanov
seo.description: Book a free 30-minute call to talk about stakeholder communication, promotion strategy, or data leadership.

sections.title: Let's talk.
sections.subtitle: I coach data engineers and data leads on stakeholder communication, promotion business cases, and career strategy. If you're stuck on the non-technical side of the job, book a call.

officeHours.description: Tell me what you're working on and where you're stuck. We'll figure out if I can help and what that looks like. No pitch, no commitment.
